notes: Export controls as the policy instrument. Measured inside the dyad gate: chip 184/2 Iran, Nvidia 164/0, Huawei 40/0, H200 34/0, export control 18/0, ASML 8/0.
'chip' kept as the shortest form -- EN word-START matching means it already covers chips/chipmaker/chipmaking, so those are not listed (rule 1).
DROPPED bare 'license'/'licence' (generic across every regulatory story) and bare 'curbs' (stance-flavoured and promiscuous).

Latin-collapse: Nvidia/ASML/SMIC/Huawei/Micron/H200/EUV/Blackwell are spelled identically in de/es/fr/it, so they live in 'en' only and still match Latin-script titles in those languages (the alias split is by alias language, not title language).
2026 phase is bidirectional: the US restricts, but China also blocked H200 imports Washington had CLEARED for export.

bundle.term: firms and named products under control
